label: Civic Pak
blurb: Local Government, Non-Profits & Civil Services. Bureaucracy automation, grant tracking, and citizen communication.

skills.label: Municipal Snow Emergency Broadcaster
skills.method: One click from the mayor updates the town website, triggers a robocall, emails the school district, and posts to Facebook that street parking is banned for plows.

skills.label: Volunteer Schedule Hole Filler
skills.method: Identifies that only 2 people are signed up for the Saturday soup kitchen shift; automatically blasts a text to past volunteers who usually work weekends.
trigger_examples: ensures non-profits actually have the manpower to operate

skills.label: Building Permit Zoning Prechecker
skills.method: Checks a homeowner's submitted shed dimensions against the specific setback laws for their neighborhood zone, instantly rejecting it with exactly what needs to be fixed.
trigger_examples: cuts permit approval wait times from 3 weeks to 3 minutes

skills.label: Pothole 311 Ticket Router
skills.method: Takes a citizen's tweeted photo of a pothole, extracts the geotag, categorizes severity, and adds it to the Department of Public Works daily asphalt route.
trigger_examples: turns angry citizen complaints into actionable civic data

skills.label: Library Overdue Fine Waiver
skills.method: Checks if a child's library card is blocked due to a $5 fine, automatically applying an "amnesty credit" so they can check out books for a school project.
trigger_examples: removes bureaucratic friction for community services

skills.label: Park Pavilion Double Booking Solver
skills.method: Reconciles the town's messy physical ledger with the online booking portal to ensure two families don't show up for the same BBQ shelter on Saturday.

skills.label: Animal Shelter Foster Matcher
skills.method: Cross-references a new aggressive-but-sweet pitbull against the database of foster homes, finding the one house that explicitly has "no cats and a 6-foot fence."
trigger_examples: prevents dangerous and heartbreaking animal returns

skills.label: Grant Fund Depletion Tracker
skills.method: Tags every $50 receipt from a youth program strictly to the $10,000 state grant that funded it, creating an instant audit-proof ledger.
trigger_examples: ensures charities don't accidentally misappropriate restricted funds

skills.label: Food Bank Inventory Expiration Alert
skills.method: Scans incoming pallet manifests, alerting volunteers to push the dairy and bread to the front of the line before it spoils.
trigger_examples: maximizes the impact of donated perishable goods

skills.label: Foia Request Pii Redactor
skills.method: Scans town council emails requested under the Freedom of Information Act, automatically blacking out employee social security numbers and personal addresses before public release.
trigger_examples: keeps small towns compliant without hiring expensive paralegals
